scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p db media .backups logs && rm -f .next/standalone/db .next/standalone/media 2>/dev/null && [ -f db/payload.db ] && cp db/payload.db ".backups/payload.db.$(date +%Y_%m_%d_%H%M%S)" || true && ls -1t .backups/payload.db.* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +31 | xargs rm -f -- 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: payload generate:importmap && next build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && ln -sf ../../db .next/standalone/db && ln -sf ../../media .next/standalone/media
